articles.title: Mayor Faisal Rana Attends Falinge Park Classic Car and Bike Show
articles.excerpt: The newly appointed Mayor of Rochdale, Faisal Rana, attended the Falinge Park Classic Car and Bike Show, hosted by the Rotary Club of Rochdale, alongside members of Andy's Man Club.
articles.content_html:
A man attended the Falinge Park Classic Car and Bike Show as the newly appointed Mayor of Rochdale. Faisal Rana met with members of Andy's Man Club, who were guests of the Rotary Club of Rochdale at the event.

The show featured a variety of classic cars and bikes, attracting enthusiasts from the local area. The event aimed to promote community engagement and support local charities.

Members of Andy's Man Club expressed their appreciation for the Mayor's support of their initiatives, which focus on mental health and wellbeing for men.

The attendance of the Mayor at such community events highlights the importance of local leadership in fostering connections and supporting charitable organisations.
articles.legal_disclaimer: This article was compiled from identified public sources and may be updated when further verified information becomes available.
